refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target over the agreed evaluation period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the evaluation period clarifies the requirement for design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime statistics over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability metrics to system stakeholders.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.
DP2: Use robust link monitoring and error detection algorithms.
DP3: Provide real-time link status reporting and alerting.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.

potential_sources: Link monitoring tightly coupled with failover logic
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically supports the FR and can be modularized to minimize coupling by separating monitoring, failover, and reporting functions.

assumptions_risks: Risk of increased system complexity impacting reliability.
Risk that failover timing may not meet availability targets.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider decomposing monitoring and reporting into separate DPs if coupling proves high in detailed design.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical network link hardware and embedded failover control logic within the vehicle system.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connections managed by the Vehicle module for teleoperation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends link status and availability metrics to NGHE Solution module.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as network hardware and failover logic are physically and logically within Vehicle.
Receives telemetry data but does not control link redundancy.
Uses link but does not implement redundancy or failover.
No direct involvement in link availability.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Placing link redundancy and failover logic within Vehicle module maximizes containment and minimizes diffusion, enabling clear ownership and maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in Vehicle module may impact maintainability.
Interface dependencies with NGHE Solution for telemetry must be well-defined.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Review interface definitions between Vehicle and NGHE Solution to ensure clear separation of concerns.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (redundant network links with failover) directly addresses the refined FR and supports the availability target.

diffusion_risks: Telemetry interface diffusion between Vehicle and NGHE Solution requires careful management.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for the DP, minimizing diffusion risks.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and link status monitoring is feasible within assigned IM boundaries.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link redundancy and failover to Vehicle module aligns with physical and logical system boundaries.

recommended_revisions: Clarify telemetry interface specifications between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
Consider decomposing monitoring and reporting functions in future refinement levels.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement of monitoring and reporting sub-FRs and their corresponding DPs and IMs is needed to reduce coupling and improve modularity.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability metrics to system stakeholders.

revise.why: To decompose the high-level FR into more atomic sub-FRs and select corresponding DPs and IMs that reduce coupling and improve architectural clarity.

assumptions: Vehicle module can host failover logic and hardware.
open_risks: Complexity in Vehicle module may affect maintainability.
evidence_needed: Failover timing and effectiveness test results.
